page_title: Attack on Titan: TV Anime Screenplay Collection 1
text:
is the first compilation of the scripts of the Attack on Titan anime, written by Yasuko Kobayashi, Hiroshi Seko and Noboru Takagi. It contains the scripts for the fist thirteen episodes of season one, as well as the script for OVA 1.

Table of Contents

#1 - To You, in 2000 Years 
#2 - That Day
#3 - A Dim Light Amid Despair
#4 - The Night of the Closing Ceremony
#5 - First Battle
#6 - The World the Girl Saw
#7 - Small Blade
#8 - I Can Hear His Heartbeat
#9 - Whereabouts of His Left Arm
#10 - Response
#11 - Idol
#12 - Wound
#13 - Primal Desire
#3.5 - Ilse's Notebook
